number of Counts Disk Write Bytes > 3 * Standard Deviation

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  -- 将 DATETIME 转换为 UNIX 时间戳，Grafana 会自动根据时区配置显示正确时间
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(t.update_time) AS time, 
  SUM(t.error_cnt) AS errstatnum
FROM (
  SELECT
    update_time,
    json_length(parse_json(errorStateTablets)) AS error_cnt
  FROM
    dbms.monitor_db_tablet_stat
) t
GROUP BY t.update_time
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Number of tablets in error state in the cluster
